hero_heading: Help us cook, bake, and hand out the Thumbs Up Friday's under the Canopy.
intro: IMPORTANT: Applications Close End Of September 2026 | The Thumbs Up Friday team runs the whole scheme! baking, serving, and keeping the cards moving every week. It's real hands-on experience, it counts toward volunteering hours, and it's a genuinely great group of people to be part of.

why_cards.title: Duke of Edinburgh
why_cards.text: Regular weekly volunteering that counts straight toward your DofE Volunteering section — logged and signed off.

why_cards.title: Real volunteering hours
why_cards.text: Build up a genuine, ongoing record of volunteering for your CV, college applications, or personal statement.

why_cards.title: Kitchen & baking skills
why_cards.text: Learn to bake properly, work safely in a kitchen, and cook for a crowd — skills that actually transfer.

why_cards.title: Leadership experience
why_cards.text: Take on responsibility for a weekly event — organising, serving, and representing the scheme to the whole school.

quotes: Thumbs Up Friday is honestly the highlight of my week — you get to see how happy people are when they get their reward.
I joined for the DofE hours and stayed because the team's just really good fun to be around.
It's proper responsibility — we run the whole thing ourselves, start to finish.
apply_note: Responses to your application are sent during term time only — not over holidays or bank holidays, so please bear with us if you apply close to the end of term.
